summary: Frontend testing completed for notification sound toggle and dynamic map buttons. All requested features verified working: Delivery driver sound toggle (data-testid='delivery-sound-toggle-btn'), Food seller sound toggle (data-testid='sound-toggle-btn'), Dual map buttons (Restaurant + Customer), Location button for distances, and Order type filter (All/Products/Food).
critical_code_review_comments: Sound toggle for delivery driver uses data-testid='delivery-sound-toggle-btn' correctly
Sound toggle for food seller uses data-testid='sound-toggle-btn' correctly
Both toggles properly switch between green (enabled) and gray (disabled) states
useNotificationSound hook correctly plays /notification.mp3 when new orders arrive
Dual map buttons implemented: '🏪 المطعم' (green) + '🏠 العميل' (blue) in AvailableOrdersList.js
Location button '📍 تحديد موقعي لرؤية المسافات' triggers GPS and shows distances
Order type filter (الكل / منتجات / طعام) works correctly in delivery dashboard
Dynamic map buttons in MyOrdersList.js change style based on order status (before/after pickup)
Driver hints ('💡 اذهب للبائع أولاً') appear based on delivery status
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test orders
context_for_next_testing_agent: All notification sound and map button features verified. Delivery driver login 0900000000/delivery123 works. Food seller login 0944444444/food123 works. There is 1 food order available for delivery testing.

Delivery Driver Sound Toggle.details: Button with data-testid='delivery-sound-toggle-btn' found in header. Toggles between bg-green-100 (enabled) and bg-gray-200 (disabled). Located in DeliveryPages.js line 547-556.

Food Seller Sound Toggle.details: Button with data-testid='sound-toggle-btn' found in header. Same toggle behavior as delivery. Only appears for food_seller user type. Located in SellerPages.js line 732-742.

Dual Map Buttons (Available Orders).details: Two map buttons in AvailableOrdersList.js: '🏪 المطعم' (green bg-green-500) and '🏠 العميل' (blue bg-blue-500). Both open Google Maps with respective addresses.

Location Button for Distances.details: Button '📍 تحديد موقعي لرؤية المسافات' triggers getCurrentLocation() and calculates distances to seller and customer. Shows distance info grid with time estimates.

Order Type Filter.details: Three filter buttons: 'الكل' (All), '📦 منتجات' (Products), '🍔 طعام' (Food). Filters work correctly and toggle between states.

Dynamic Map Buttons (My Orders).details: MyOrdersList.js implements dynamic styling - seller button prominent before pickup, customer button prominent after pickup. Driver hints displayed based on order status.

mocked_apis.GPS Location: Uses hardcoded Syrian city coordinates + fallback mock location when GPS fails
mocked_apis.Distance Calculator: distanceCalculator.js uses haversine formula with Syrian city coordinates
